data.description:
A safe, immutable repo view at a caller-chosen ref.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] git rev-parse <ref>^{commit} -> git archive that SHA -> hardened tar extract (reject absolute/symlink-escape), chmod read-only.
- [ ] Gated to read-only/no-git steps; handle export-ignore/export-subst/LFS/submodule/symlink; size guard; cache by SHA.
- [ ] WS-D owns snapshot creation + finally-teardown and the fs_tools.py -> llm/workflow/snapshot.py split trigger.
Files: src/rebar/llm/fs_tools.py, src/rebar/llm/workflow/snapshot.py
data.title: WS-D2: Hardened git-ref filesystem snapshot
